name: Karlia API
description: Karlia is a French CRM platform. The API v2 provides comprehensive management of customers, suppliers, contacts, opportunities, documents, products, equipment, purchases, bank accounts, events, notes, tasks, calls, time entries, projects, tickets, forms, webhooks, and users.
